练习三十二：《遇到困难不放弃》: Exercise 32: "Don't give up when encountering difficulties"
练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》: Exercise 34: "Have the courage to admit mistakes"
朗读短文必备技巧: Essential skills for reading short passages aloud
A看图说话30分: ALook at the pictures and talk for 30 minutes
问题一：描述图片或录像片段的内容。: Question 1: Describe the content of the picture or video clip.
谈谈图片中最引起你注意的一件事: Talk about the one thing in the picture that caught your attention the most
谈谈你在录像中看到的一件事: Talk about something you saw in the video
在这张图片中最引起我注意是: What caught my attention most in this picture is
在图片中我看到在什么地方有什么人在做什么事: In the picture I see someone doing something somewhere
这段录像的主要内容是: The main content of this video is
在录像中我看到时间地点人物起因经过结果: In the video, I saw the time, place, person, cause, process, and result.
问题二：联系自己的经验，说说你看过的／做过的或喜欢做的事情。: Question 2: Connect with your own experience and talk about things you have seen/done or like to do.
问题三：针对主题，提出建议或看法，并举例证明或说明原因。: Question 3: Provide suggestions or opinions on the topic, and provide examples to prove or explain the reasons.
看了这一幕我感到: After watching this scene, I felt
对的行为：像他一样／向他学习: Correct behavior: Like him/Learn from him
Feeling：学到了什么道理？／有什么感受？: Feeling: What did you learn? /How do you feel?
可以用：首先，其次，再次，最后。: Can be used: first, second, third, last.
父母：成为孩子的榜样: Parents: Be a role model for your children
个人／自己：由我做起／以身作则: Personal/self: Start with me/lead by example
政府：通过媒体，如电视、报纸或广告等教育和灌输国民: Government: educate and indoctrinate citizens through the media, such as television, newspapers, or advertising
学校：校长可以在周会上表扬／奖励学生: School: The principal can praise/reward students at weekly meetings
总结：社会就会更和谐、美好: Summary: Society will be more harmonious and beautiful
问题六：你有没有看过或做过危险的事情？请谈一谈你的经历。: Question 6: Have you ever seen or done anything dangerous? Please talk about your experience.
危险的事情：在组屋楼下溜滑轮；不听告示牌；可能跌倒、受伤、撞到别人；破坏公物；影: Dangerous things: rollerblading downstairs in a HDB flat; not listening to notices; may fall, get injured, or bump into others; vandalize public property; affect the reputation of the school; should go to the park to play.
问题七：你有没有帮父母做过家务？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 7: Have you ever helped your parents with housework? Talk about your experience.
关键词：洗碗、洗衣服、打扫卫生、晾衣服、折衣服、减轻父母负担。: Keywords: washing dishes, washing clothes, cleaning, hanging clothes, folding clothes, reducing the burden on parents.
问题八：你有没有做过关心家人的事情？说说你的经历。: Question 8: Have you ever done anything to care about your family? Tell us about your experience.
问题九：谈一谈你在学校里有没有看到过或者做过有礼貌的事情。: Question 9: Talk about any polite things you have seen or done in school.
问题十：谈一谈你在生活中做过的一件有责任感的事情。: Question 10: Talk about a responsible thing you have done in your life.
问题十一：你曾参加过学校组织的什么活动？你从活动中学到了什么？: Question 11: What activities have you participated in organized by the school? What did you learn from the event?
问题十二：谈一谈你在学校里参加了什么课外活动。: Question 12: Talk about what extracurricular activities you participated in in school.
问题十三：周末的时候，你通常会和家人做什么？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 13: What do you usually do with your family on weekends? Talk about your experience.
问题十四：你平时经常去购物中心吗？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 14: Do you often go to shopping malls? Talk about your experience.
问题十五：你平时经常去小贩中心吗？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 15: Do you usually go to hawker centers? Talk about your experience.
问题十六：你去海边野餐过吗？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 16: Have you ever had a picnic at the beach? Talk about your experience.
问题十七：你搭乘过地铁吗？谈一谈你的经历。: Question 17: Have you ever taken the subway? Talk about your experience.
问题十八：你有没有送过礼物给家人？说说你的经历。: Question 18: Have you ever given gifts to your family? Tell us about your experience.
问题十九：你和家人庆祝什么节日？谈谈你的经历。: Question 19: What holidays do you celebrate with your family? Talk about your experience.
在录像中我看到有一名男同学在图书馆看书他坐在桌子前专心致志地看书当他看完书之后就: In the video, I saw a male student reading in the library. He sat at the table and read attentively. After he finished reading, he put the books back on the bookshelf so that others could find them.
我还看到一群人在排队借书有两个男生在大声讲话一个高个子的男生看见了连忙走上前阻止: I also saw a group of people queuing up to borrow books. Two boys were talking loudly. A tall boy saw it and stepped forward to stop them. He told them that they should stay quiet and not disturb others. The two boys felt very embarrassed after hearing this.
看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为男孩看完书后，把书本放回书架上的行为是正确的: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the boy's behavior of putting the books back on the bookshelf after reading them is correct and worthy of our learning and praise. Because the library is a good place for everyone to read and study, you must always remember to think of others, pay attention to your words and deeds, and be a good citizen who thinks of others. If it were me, I would do what they did.
在录像中，我看到一个周末的上午，在组屋楼下，一位男孩在爸爸的帮助下学骑脚踏车。突: In the video, I saw a boy learning to ride a bicycle with the help of his father on a weekend morning downstairs in a HDB flat. Suddenly, the boy lost his balance and fell to the ground. The father hurriedly stepped forward to help the boy up. The boy's father did not allow him to continue studying. However, the boy refused to give up and wanted to try again, so his father had no choice but to agree. This time, the boy rode steadily and did not fall again.
看了这段录像我感到十分开心我认为男孩遇到困难不放弃的精神是值得我们学习和称赞的因: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the boy's spirit of not giving up when encountering difficulties is worthy of our study and praise, because we will all encounter difficulties on the road of life. As long as we have the courage to face it and persevere to the end, we can overcome difficulties. If it were me, I would do the same thing as the boy.
在录像中，我看到一个穿着校服的女生，背着书包，走在放学回家的路上。突然，女生发现: In the video, I saw a girl in school uniform, carrying a schoolbag, walking on her way home from school. Suddenly, the girl found a watch on the ground. The girl quickly stepped forward, picked up the watch, and took a closer look. It turned out to be a watch that she liked very much. At this moment, a mother was looking for something with her daughter and son, looking very anxious. The girls guessed that this watch should be what they were looking for. So, the girl stepped forward in three steps and returned the watch to its original owner.
小女孩看见失而复得的手表露出开心的笑容并向女生连声道谢女孩的妈妈竖起大拇指称赞她: The little girl smiled happily when she saw the lost watch and thanked the girl repeatedly. The girl's mother gave her a thumbs up and praised her as a good child who found money.
看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为录像中女生诚实的行为，是值得我们学习和称赞的: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the honest behavior of the girls in the video is worthy of our learning and praise. Because honesty is a virtue, we should have the spirit of picking up money and be an honest person. When we see valuable items, we should return them to their original owners and should not keep them for ourselves. If I were the girl in the video, I would be like her and return things to their original owners promptly when I pick them up.
这张图片的主要内容是：做错事时应该勇敢面对，主动认错并承担责任。: The main content of this picture is: when you do something wrong, you should face it bravely, take the initiative to admit your mistake and take responsibility.
在图片中，我看到有一家人在海边开心地玩沙滩排球。其中一个小男孩在打球时，一个不小: In the picture, I saw a family happily playing beach volleyball at the beach. One of the little boys was playing ball when he accidentally hit the ball too hard and hit a little girl who was sitting under a tree reading a book. The little girl screamed in pain. The little boy felt very embarrassed. He bravely walked up to the little girl and apologized to the little girl. The little girl also graciously forgave him and returned the ball to the little boy.
看了这一幕我感到十分开心我认为小男孩勇于认错的态度是值得我们学习和称赞的因为每个: I felt very happy after watching this scene. I think the little boy's attitude of having the courage to admit his mistakes is worthy of our study and praise, because everyone can make mistakes. The important thing is that when we make mistakes, we should know the mistakes and correct them so as not to make the same mistakes again. If it were me, I would take the initiative to admit my mistakes like him.
在图片中我看到有一个扎着辫子的小女孩背着书包走进了麦当劳快餐店她找了一个位子坐下: In the picture, I saw a little girl with pigtails walking into a McDonald's fast food restaurant with a schoolbag on her back. She found a seat and sat down, then took out her wallet from her schoolbag and went to the counter to buy burgers and drinks but left her mobile phone on the table.
买完食物后，她端着餐盘回到座位，边吃边看手机。这时，她的手机响了。她赶快拿起手机: After buying the food, she returned to her seat with the dinner plate and looked at her phone while eating. At this moment, her cell phone rang. She quickly picked up her phone and walked outside the fast food restaurant to answer the call, but left her wallet on the table. The waiter at the fast food restaurant saw the wallet on the table and shook his head, feeling that the owner of the wallet was really careless. So, the waiter stood at the table, waiting for the owner of the wallet to come back, and reminded her to keep her valuables safe.
看了这一幕我感到十分担心我认为那位小女孩真是太粗心了丢三落四的没有责任心因为如果: After watching this scene, I felt very worried. I thought the little girl was so careless and irresponsible because if her cell phone or wallet was lost or stolen, it would be troublesome and would bring trouble and losses to herself. If I were the little girl in the picture, I would take good care of my belongings to avoid unnecessary losses to myself.
在录像中我看到有三个小女孩坐在客厅的沙发上玩游戏和看电视她们的妈妈看见了就决定带: In the video, I saw three little girls sitting on the sofa in the living room, playing games and watching TV. Their mother saw this and decided to take them out to do some exercise. They came to the downstairs of the HDB flat to use the fitness equipment to exercise, and then jogged around the track downstairs.
有一个小女孩坐在长凳上玩手机她的朋友看见了立刻叫她一起去玩电动平衡车并很有耐心地: There was a little girl sitting on the bench playing with her mobile phone. When her friend saw it, she immediately asked her to play with the electric balance car and patiently taught her how to play with the electric balance car. Two boys were playing football and they were having a great time. Many classmates were having a good time playing badminton in the school's indoor gym.
看了这段录像我感到十分开心我认为除了学习之外运动对我们学生来说也是十分必要的因为: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think that in addition to studying, exercise is also very necessary for our students. Doing more exercise can make the body stronger and less likely to get sick. It can also reduce the pressure of study and enhance the relationship between family and friends. If it were me, I would also participate in various sports activities to develop a good habit of loving sports.
我曾经看过一件危险的事情: I once saw a dangerous thing
记得一天下午我放学回家后看见有一个顽皮的小男孩在组屋楼下溜滑轮一个女士看到了就指: I remember one afternoon when I came home from school, I saw a naughty little boy roller-skating downstairs in a HDB flat. A lady saw this and pointed at the sign on the wall prohibiting roller-skating and told him not to roller-skating. But he turned a deaf ear to the lady’s words and continued to play.
我认为小男孩在组屋楼下溜滑轮是非常危险的行为他没有为别人的安全着想如果一个不小心: I think it is very dangerous for a little boy to skate downstairs in a HDB flat. He does not think about the safety of others. If he is not careful, he will not only fall and injure himself, but also hit others, especially children, pregnant women or the elderly. They may be injured or hospitalized and the consequences will be disastrous.
总而言之我们不应该在组屋楼下溜滑轮如果想要溜滑轮就应该到公园去玩: In short, we shouldn’t roller skate downstairs in HDB flats. If we want to roller skate, we should go to the park to play.
我帮父母做过家务: I helped my parents with housework
记得那是一个凉风习习的下午，放学回家后，我看到家里又脏又乱，吃早餐的碗盘也没洗。: I remember it was a breezy afternoon. After I came home from school, I saw that the house was dirty and messy, and the dishes for breakfast had not been washed. I thought to myself: My parents are usually busy with work, and they have to take care of our daily life after work, which is very hard. So, I decided to help them do some simple housework.
我先清洗了碗盘然后开始打扫家里的卫生又是扫地又是擦桌子不一会儿我累得满头大汗但一: I first washed the dishes and then started cleaning the house. I swept the floor and wiped the table. After a while, I was so tired that I was sweating profusely. But when I thought that I could reduce the burden on my parents and prevent them from being too tired, I insisted on finishing the housework.
妈妈放工回家后看到家里十分干净脸上露出了欣慰的笑容还称赞我是一个懂事的好孩子总的: When my mother came home from work, she saw that the house was very clean. She had a happy smile on her face and praised me as a good and sensible child. Overall, this incident made me deeply appreciate the hard work and difficulty of my parents. From that day on, I often helped my parents with some housework within my ability to reduce their burden.
其他家务劳动：洗碗、洗衣服、打扫卫生、晾衣服、折衣服等。: Other housework: washing dishes, washing clothes, cleaning, hanging clothes, folding clothes, etc.
我做过关心家人的事情: I've done things to care about my family
事例一：记得在我上小三的时候，有一次放学回家后，发现妈妈满脸通红、有气无力地躺在: Example 1: I remember when I was in primary school, I came home from school and found my mother lying on the bed with a red face and weak. It turned out that my mother had a cold and a fever. Seeing how uncomfortable she was, I was so anxious that I quickly got her some cold medicine. Then I found another antipyretic patch and put it on my mother’s forehead to help her cool down. Then I ran to the coffee shop downstairs, helped my mother pack a bowl of porridge, and brought it back to feed her. After my mother finished the porridge, a happy smile appeared on her red face and she praised me as a filial child.
事例二：记得去年学校假期期间，爸爸妈妈一大早便去上班了。我和弟弟起床后，发现弟弟: Example 2: I remember that during the school holidays last year, my parents went to work early in the morning. After my brother and I got up, we found that my brother was feeling hot, so I quickly took out a thermometer to measure his temperature. After taking his temperature, I found that my brother's fever reached 39 degrees. I was shocked and quickly called my mother to tell him. When my mother found out, she immediately rushed home from the company. While I was waiting for my mother, I took a towel and wiped the sweat off my brother's body to prevent him from catching cold again. Later, my brother's illness improved. My mother praised me for growing up and knowing how to take care of my younger brother.
我曾在学校里做过一件有礼貌的事情: I once did a polite thing in school
记得有一次课间休息时，我和几名值日生一起打扫教室。其他同学都早早地拿到了自己的清: I remember one time during recess, I cleaned the classroom with several students on duty. Other students got their own cleaning tools early, but the class mop happened to be broken, so I went to borrow a mop from the school janitor, Uncle Lin. I walked to the door of the school laboratory in three steps and two steps at a time, pushed open the door of the school laboratory, and shouted: "Where is the mop?" Unexpectedly, Uncle Lin ignored me and continued to do the work at hand.
我心中十分纳闷。突然，我想起了老师平日的教导：要做一个有礼貌的好孩子，在学校里不: I was very puzzled. Suddenly, I remembered the teacher's daily teaching: to be a good and polite child, you must respect not only the teacher, but also other staff in school. Thinking of this, I walked to Uncle Lin and said softly to Uncle Lin: "Uncle Lin, I'm sorry! I was rude to you just now, please forgive me, okay? Can I borrow a mop from you?" After hearing this, Uncle Lin raised his head and said with a smile: "Of course, this is a good polite boy."
俗话说：“让礼一寸，得礼一尺。”身为学生的我们，要时刻提醒自己做一个尊敬师长、懂: As the saying goes: "If you give an inch of courtesy, you will receive a foot of courtesy." As students, we must always remind ourselves to be a good child who respects teachers and is polite.
谈一谈你在生活中做过的一件有责任感的事情: Talk about a responsible thing you have done in your life
事例1：不小心打翻了一杯饮料，把从图书馆借来的书给弄湿、弄脏了，尝试弄干净，留下: Example 1: I accidentally spilled a drink and got the books I borrowed from the library wet and dirty. I tried to clean them, leaving traces. I went to the library and told the administrator everything, apologizing, taking responsibility, and making compensation. The administrator praised me as a good kid who is honest and responsible.
事例2：水瓶里的水洒在食堂的地上，立刻抹干净，以免别人踩到滑倒受伤，后果不堪设想: Example 2: If the water in the water bottle is spilled on the canteen floor, wipe it up immediately to prevent others from stepping on it and slipping and getting injured, with disastrous consequences.
事例3：下雨时，上巴士把湿的雨伞装进塑料袋。: Example 3: When it rains, you get on the bus and put your wet umbrella in a plastic bag.
事例4：在小贩中心用餐后，把碗碟放在碗盘收集处。: Example 4: After eating at the hawker center, put the dishes in the dish collection area.
事例5：父母生病时，帮忙照顾弟弟妹妹，做家务，不让父母操心。: Example 5: When parents are sick, help take care of younger siblings and do housework so that parents don’t have to worry.
事例6：在超级市场买东西，货架上的东西掉在地上，帮忙捡起来放回原位，避免其他人被: Example 6: When shopping in the supermarket, something on the shelf falls to the ground. Help pick it up and put it back in its place to prevent others from tripping over the items on the floor.
我曾经参加过学校组织的校外学习之旅在那次的活动中我学到了很多课本中学不到的知识: I once participated in an off-campus study trip organized by the school. During that activity, I learned a lot of knowledge that cannot be learned in textbooks.
记得有一次老师带我们去植物园到那里学习和认识各种植物我们一走进植物园时就被那五颜: I remember one time the teacher took us to the botanical garden to learn and understand various plants. As soon as we entered the botanical garden, we were attracted by the colorful flowers and plants. Later, the teacher took us to know many strange plants and told us the growth characteristics of those plants.
我在书本上看过一些植物的图片它们都长得相似我看不出什么差别来到植物园后我才真正了: I have seen some pictures of plants in books. They all look similar. I can't see any difference. Only after I came to the botanical garden did I really understand the characteristics of different plants. I really like this kind of outdoor learning activity. This way of learning makes me feel very relaxed and interesting, and the knowledge I learned is also deep in my memory.
童子军：学会了基本生活技能、拜访老人院和孤儿院、打扫、表演节目。: Boy Scouts: Learned basic life skills, visited nursing homes and orphanages, cleaned, and performed shows.
游泳：教练教游泳姿势、游泳技巧、求生技能等。: Swimming: The coach teaches swimming postures, swimming skills, survival skills, etc.
网球：学习不同技巧，双打如何配合。: Tennis: Learn different techniques and how to work together in doubles.
合唱团：发声、合唱技巧、学习不同国家的歌曲、陶冶情操、国外交流表演。: Chorus: Vocal production, chorus skills, learning songs from different countries, cultivating sentiments, and foreign exchange performances.
爬武吉知马山：爬不动、放弃、鼓励、坚持到底、山顶。: Climb Bukit Timah Hill: unable to climb, give up, encourage, persevere to the end, reach the top.
去东海岸骑脚踏车或放风筝：海边很多垃圾。: Go cycling or flying a kite on the east coast: there’s a lot of trash on the beach.
去圣淘沙的环球影城：排队、插队。: Going to Universal Studios in Sentosa: waiting in line, jumping in line.
去图书馆读书：吃东西、占位等。: Go to the library to study: eat, take a seat, etc.
去动物园或植物园：给小动物喂食、采花。: Go to a zoo or botanical garden: feed the animals and pick flowers.
小男孩要买炸薯条家长不答应小男孩乱发脾气在购物中心乱跑: The little boy wanted to buy french fries, but the parents refused. The little boy lost his temper and ran around in the shopping mall.
这样的行为让人担心因为他可能撞到别人或被别人撞到而且炸薯条没有营养经常吃会有害身: This kind of behavior is worrying because he may hit or be hit by others, and French fries are not nutritious and eating them regularly will be harmful to health.
如果是我我会听从家长的劝告多吃水果蔬菜多运动: If it were me, I would follow my parents’ advice to eat more fruits and vegetables and exercise more.
在小贩中心我看见有人和朋友喝饮料时吸烟刺鼻的烟味让人不舒服: In the hawker centre, I saw some people smoking while drinking with friends. The pungent smell of smoke was very uncomfortable.
虽然有告示牌提醒不准吸烟但他们视若无睹我行我素这种行为没有公德心也很自私: Although there are signs warning against smoking, they turn a blind eye and go their own way. This behavior is unethical and selfish.
如果是我我会提醒他们不要在小贩中心吸烟如果他们不听我会告诉工作人员: If it were me I would remind them not to smoke in the hawker center and if they don't listen I will tell the staff
在海边野餐时有人乱丢垃圾这是没有公德心的行为: It is unethical behavior for someone to litter during a picnic on the beach.
有人堆沙堡时把沙子弄进别人的眼睛这是危险的行为: It is dangerous for someone to put sand in someone else's eyes while building a sandcastle.
有人游泳时做危险动作可能会溺水: Someone may drown if they do dangerous things while swimming
我们应该保持海边清洁也应该注意安全: We should keep the beach clean and pay attention to safety
吃东西：没有公德心、对告示牌不理睬、不遵守公共规则、污染车厢里的空气、影响其他乘: Eating: being unethical, ignoring signs, not following public rules, polluting the air in the carriage, and affecting other passengers.
大声讲电话：没有公德心、没有礼貌、影响其他乘客。: Talking loudly on the phone: unethical, impolite, and disturbing other passengers.
追逐嬉闹：危险、受伤、后果严重、不遵守公共规则。: Chase and play: danger, injury, serious consequences, failure to follow public rules.
坐在车厢门口：危险、影响其他乘客上下车、被踩到或绊倒别人、受伤。: Sitting at the door of the carriage: dangerous, affecting other passengers getting on and off the train, being stepped on or tripping over others, and getting injured.
在父母生日或父亲节母亲节的时候可以自己亲手制作一些小礼物小卡片等写上祝福或感谢的: On your parents’ birthdays or Father’s Day and Mother’s Day, you can make some small gifts and cards with your own hands, write blessings or words of thanks on them, and send them to your parents.
这样可以感谢父母的养育之恩和为我们付出的一切: This way we can thank our parents for their upbringing and everything they have done for us
全家一起为奶奶庆祝生日举办了一个生日会让她留下美好的回忆: Celebrating grandma’s birthday with the whole family, hosting a birthday party will leave her with wonderful memories.
奶奶退休了辛苦了大半辈子大家讲小时候的故事也谈到奶奶节俭不舍得花钱: Grandma is retired and has worked hard for most of her life. Everyone tells stories about her childhood and talks about grandma being frugal and not willing to spend money.
一家人聚在一起热热闹闹说祝福语吃晚餐无糖生日蛋糕和糕点我们希望奶奶有更多时间陪伴: The family got together in a lively manner, said blessings, and had dinner with sugar-free birthday cakes and pastries. We hope grandma can spend more time with her family and stay healthy.
学校鼓励学生做个有公德心的好公民，应当做到以下几点：: The school encourages students to be good, public-minded citizens and should do the following:
第一在校内布告栏上贴有关公德心的海报提高学生的公德心意识: First, post posters about public morality on the school bulletin board to improve students’ awareness of public morality.
第二在德育课上给学生观看有关公德心的录像鼓励学生做个有公德心的人: Second, in the moral education class, watch a video about public morality for students to encourage them to be public-minded people.
第三举办公德心主题周表扬和鼓励那些有公德心的学生引导更多学生做有公德心的事: The third is to hold a public-minded theme week to praise and encourage those students who are public-minded and guide more students to do things that are public-minded.
第四老师应当做学生的好榜样注意自己的言行举止以身作则给学生树立一个学习的好榜样: Fourth, teachers should be a good example for students, pay attention to their words and deeds, and lead by example to set a good example for students to learn from.
总的来说学校应该鼓励学生做一个有公德心的人这样一来我们的校园生活将会更加美好: In general, schools should encourage students to be public-minded people, so that our campus life will be better
学校要鼓励学生做个有礼貌的好孩子，应该做到以下几点：: To encourage students to be polite and good children, schools should do the following:
第一举办相关的主题周活动表扬和鼓励那些有礼貌的学生如果有同学做了没有礼貌的事情学: First, hold relevant theme week activities to praise and encourage polite students. If some students do something impolite, the school should also punish them accordingly.
第二在德育课上给学生观看相关主题的录像教导学生怎样做才算有礼貌提醒学生要做一个有: Second, in the moral education class, watch videos on related topics to teach students how to be polite and remind students to be a good and polite child.
第三在校园内挂布条或者张贴海报规定学生看见老师或长辈时一定要向对方行礼问好: Third, hang banners or post posters on campus to stipulate that students must salute teachers or elders when they see them.
总的来说学校应该鼓励学生做一个有礼貌的好孩子这样一来我们的校园生活将会更加美好: In general, schools should encourage students to be good, polite children, so that our campus life will be better.
第一举办交通安全主题周交通安全知识竞赛等老师要在周会上提醒学生过马路时要注意安全: The first traffic safety theme week traffic safety knowledge competition and other teachers will remind students to pay attention to safety when crossing the road at the weekly meeting
第二在德育课上播放有关交通安全的录像教育学生珍爱自己的生命注意安全: Second, videos on traffic safety are played in moral education classes to teach students to cherish their lives and pay attention to safety.
第三在校园内挂布条或者张贴海报强化学生的交通安全意识: Third, hang banners or post posters on campus to enhance students’ awareness of traffic safety.
第四学校和家长配合老师要和家长多沟通请家长以身作则教育孩子注意交通安全的重要性: Fourth, schools and parents should cooperate with teachers to communicate more with parents and ask parents to teach their children the importance of traffic safety by setting an example.
总的来说学校要想尽办法并请家长配合多管齐下才能更好地提醒学生注意交通安全: In general, schools must try their best and ask parents to cooperate in a multi-pronged approach to better remind students to pay attention to traffic safety.
问题四：你认为学校应该如何鼓励学生多做好事？: Question 4: How do you think schools should encourage students to do more good deeds?
第一张贴宣传海报或挂条幅: Be the first to put up promotional posters or hang banners
第二德育课上观看视频: Watch the video in the second moral education class
第三分发鼓励卡盖章: The third distribution encouragement card is stamped
第四，多组织学生参加一些活动。例如：帮助清洁工人，一起打扫，体验和了解。: Fourth, organize more students to participate in some activities. For example: help the cleaners, clean together, experience and understand.
第五，学校请家长配合。例如：请家长配合鼓励，互相通知。: Fifth, the school asks parents to cooperate. For example: Parents are asked to cooperate, encourage and inform each other.
问题五：你认为学校应该怎样鼓励学生参加体育运动？: Question 5: How do you think schools should encourage students to participate in sports?
第一在体育课上开展各种各样的体育运动引起同学们的兴趣: First, carry out various sports in physical education class to arouse students' interest
第二举行体育比赛培养团队精神增进友谊: The second is to hold sports competitions to cultivate team spirit and enhance friendship.
第三邀请著名运动员来演讲号召大家参与体育活动: Third, invite famous athletes to give speeches and call on everyone to participate in sports activities.
第一在校内布告栏上贴相关主题的海报: Be the first to post posters on relevant topics on the school bulletin board
第二在德育课上给学生观看有关义工活动的录像: Second, watch videos about volunteer activities for students in moral education classes.
第三举办义工活动主题周活动表扬和鼓励那些积极参与义工活动的学生: The third organization organized a theme week of volunteer activities to praise and encourage students who actively participate in volunteer activities.
第四学校要请家长配合: The fourth school asks parents to cooperate
总而言之学校的正确教导家长的大力支持学生参与义工活动为社会做贡献为弱势群体带来温: All in all, the school provides correct teachings and parents’ strong support for students to participate in volunteer activities, contribute to society, and bring warmth and care to disadvantaged groups.
第一贴上关于环保的海报: The first poster about environmental protection
第二播放有关环保主题的录像: Second, play a video about environmental protection themes
第三举行环保主题周活动: The third environmental protection theme week event was held
第四表扬或奖励表现突出的个人: Fourth, praise or reward individuals with outstanding performance
总而言之环境保护人人有责: All in all, environmental protection is everyone’s responsibility
第一利用周末或节假日做一些有意义的活动参与互动了解孩子的喜好和想法体会到关心与爱: First, use weekends or holidays to do some meaningful activities, participate in interactions, understand children's preferences and ideas, experience care and love, and enhance relationships.
第二，在生活中互相关心，互相帮助。如：早晚问候，送上祝福或亲手制作的小卡片，报答: Second, care for and help each other in life. For example: greetings in the morning and evening, sending blessings or small handmade cards to repay the kindness of raising children; parents are busy at work, so do what you can to reduce their burden.
记住父母的生日父亲节母亲节送上卡片和祝福: Remember your parents’ birthdays, send cards and wishes on Father’s Day and Mother’s Day
多为父母着想，不要让父母为你担心。例如：不打扰工作，好好学习。: Think more about your parents and don't let your parents worry about you. For example: Don’t interrupt your work and study hard.
为父母做点力所能及的事情，减轻他们的负担。例如：做家务、帮忙照顾弟妹、捶捶背、揉: Do what you can for your parents to reduce their burden. For example: doing housework, helping to take care of younger siblings, rubbing backs, rubbing shoulders, etc.
很重要通过这些活动增进沟通和互相了解增加相处时间增进感情增长知识扩大视野增强凝聚: It is very important to enhance communication and mutual understanding through these activities, increase time together, enhance feelings, increase knowledge, expand horizons and enhance cohesion.
第一在家里我们要多为父母着想: First, we should think more about our parents at home
第二在学校里我们应该尊敬老师和同学做个有礼貌的好孩子: Secondly, we should respect teachers and classmates in school and be good and polite children.
第三在社会上我们要遵守一些基本的公共规则: Third, in society we must abide by some basic public rules
早睡早起多喝水足够休息三多三少多做运动: Go to bed early and get up early. Drink plenty of water. Get enough rest. Do more exercise.
责任感很重要身为学生好好学习上课专心听讲准时完成并上交功课不抄别人的作业: A sense of responsibility is very important as a student. Study hard in class, pay attention to lectures, complete and hand in homework on time, and do not copy other people’s homework.
遵守校规准时到校上课保持学校环境的清洁和卫生: Follow school rules, come to school on time, and keep the school environment clean and hygienic.
担任组长班长和学长的同学要以身作则成为其他同学学习的好榜样: Students who serve as group leaders, squad leaders and seniors should lead by example and become good role models for other students to learn from.
学校举办的活动积极参加: Actively participate in activities organized by the school
我会上前阻止: I will step forward to stop
乱丢垃圾是一种没有公德心的行为会破坏环境卫生增加清洁工人的负担: Littering is an unethical behavior that damages environmental hygiene and increases the burden on cleaning workers.
乱丢垃圾会破坏新加坡花园城市的美誉: Littering will ruin Singapore’s reputation as a garden city
保护环境人人有责爱护环境是每个人的责任为环保尽一份力: Protecting the environment is everyone’s responsibility. Taking care of the environment is everyone’s responsibility. Do your part to protect the environment.
首先，宣传活动，如：发传单、告示牌等。: First, publicity activities, such as distributing leaflets, billboards, etc.
总之每个人齐心合力团结合作: In short, everyone works together, unites and cooperates
打招呼很快熟悉举办聚会邀请参加守望相助增进感情: Say hello and quickly get familiar with each other. Host a party and invite to join. Watch and help each other to enhance feelings.
从小事做起专心听课积极回答问题认真地完成功课主动行礼和打招呼教师节为老师准备亲手: Start with small things, listen attentively to the class, actively answer questions, complete your homework seriously, take the initiative to salute and say hello, and prepare a handmade card for teachers on Teacher's Day.
重要第一过分依赖父母会让我们产生依赖心理会变得越来越懒惰: The first important thing is that over-reliance on our parents will make us dependent and make us lazier and lazier.
第二太依赖父母也会让我们在学习上变得懒散经常要父母提醒才学习: Secondly, being too dependent on our parents can also make us lazy in study. We often have to be reminded by our parents to study.
第三当我们太过依赖别人就会让我们失去克服困难的能力和勇气无法面对压力和失败: Third, when we rely too much on others, we lose the ability and courage to overcome difficulties and cannot face pressure and failure.
父母工作忙回家晚把心事告诉朋友安慰在家靠父母出外靠朋友伸出援手分享喜和忧: Parents are busy at work and come home late, telling their friends what is on their mind to comfort them at home. When parents are out, relying on friends to lend a helping hand and share joys and sorrows.
问题二十：如果你的朋友遇到困难想要放弃，你会怎样劝他？: Question 20: If your friend encounters difficulties and wants to give up, how would you persuade him?
首先我会告诉他生活中总是会遇到各种各样的困难要敢于面对困难和问题不轻言放弃: First of all, I will tell him that he will always encounter various difficulties in life, and he must dare to face difficulties and problems and never give up easily.
其次我会和他分享一些励志的电影和书籍鼓励他不要放弃要继续努力: Secondly, I will share some inspirational movies and books with him to encourage him not to give up and to keep working hard.
第三我会建议他做一个时间表合理安排时间: Third, I would suggest him to make a schedule and arrange his time reasonably.
问题二十一：你认为在日常生活中我们还应该养成哪些好习惯？: Question 21: What other good habits do you think we should develop in our daily lives?
首先，我们要养成守时的好习惯。如：和朋友约好，不迟到。: First of all, we must develop a good habit of punctuality. For example: Make an appointment with a friend and not be late.
其次我们也要养成早睡早起的好习惯有精神吸收知识: Secondly, we must also develop a good habit of going to bed early and getting up early to have the energy to absorb knowledge.
第三，我们还要养成良好的个人卫生习惯。如：上厕所后洗手，吃饭前洗手，吃饭后要漱口: Third, we must also develop good personal hygiene habits. For example: wash your hands after going to the toilet, wash your hands before eating, rinse your mouth after eating, and brush your teeth in the morning and evening.
第四，我们要养成良好的饮食习惯：不挑食，不浪费。: Fourth, we must develop good eating habits: no picky eaters and no waste.
最后我们要养成爱运动的习惯: Finally, we must develop the habit of loving sports
问题二十二：你认为我们应该怎样好好利用课余时间？: Question 22: How do you think we should make good use of our spare time?
第一利用课余时间温习功课遇到不明白的地方可以查字典平时勤于温习到了考试时便不会临: First, use your spare time to review your homework. If you encounter something you don’t understand, you can look it up in the dictionary. If you study diligently, you won’t be cramming for the exam.
第二在课余时间阅读一些有益的书报这不但能使我们获得更多的知识也可以提高我们的写作: Second, reading some useful books and newspapers in our spare time will not only enable us to acquire more knowledge, but also improve our writing skills.
第三在课余时间做一些有益身心健康的运动如打篮球跑步跳绳和打羽毛球等等: Third, do some sports that are good for physical and mental health in your spare time, such as playing basketball, running, skipping, and playing badminton, etc.
第四父母为了家人的生活一天到晚工作因此我们应该利用课余时间在家里帮忙做家务和照顾: Fourth, parents work all day long to support their families, so we should use our spare time at home to help with housework and take care of our younger siblings.
除了以上几点外我们还可以合理安排自己的课余时间使生活更充实更有意义: In addition to the above points, we can also reasonably arrange our spare time to make our life more fulfilling and meaningful.
注意停顿和重音: Pay attention to pauses and stress
抑扬顿挫读出声调的变化: Read the changes in tone with cadence
饱含深情读出感情色彩: Read the emotional color with deep feeling
标点符号的停顿：顿号停顿半拍；逗号、冒号停顿一拍；句号、问号、感叹号等停顿两拍；: Pauses for punctuation marks: half a beat for pauses; one beat for commas and colons; two beats for periods, question marks, exclamation marks, etc.; three beats between paragraphs.
语意的停顿：如果遇到长句子，没办法一口气把整个句子读完，就需要按照句子的意思来停: Semantic pause: If you encounter a long sentence and cannot read the entire sentence in one breath, you need to pause according to the meaning of the sentence. Speech pauses are usually half a beat.
例：那是春风，春风在招呼咱们／到外面去呢！你能不能／带我出去见识见识？: Example: That is the spring breeze, the spring breeze is calling us/go outside! Can you take me out to see some things?
名词前面的形容词通常重读。例如：啊！好个光明的世界！: Adjectives preceding nouns are usually stressed. For example: Ah! What a bright world!
表示强调作用的字词要重读。例如：它有点儿渴，喝了口水，又把身子挺一挺。几天以后，: Words expressing emphasis should be stressed. For example: It was a little thirsty, drank some water, and straightened its body. A few days later, the seed finally saw the outside world.
感叹句中的多么、好、太等词语需要重读。例如：这里的鲜花多么漂亮啊！啊！好个光明的: Words such as "how", "good" and "too" in exclamatory sentences need to be stressed. For example: How beautiful the flowers are here! ah! What a bright world! You are so awesome!
问号句要用声调。例如：那是什么声音？外面是什么样子呢？也这么黑吗？: Question mark sentences should use intonation. For example: What is that sound? What's it like outside? Is it also this dark?
感叹句多用降调。例如：不，外面亮得很！: Exclamatory sentences often use falling intonation. For example: No, it's very bright outside!
排比句语速要越来越快，声音越来越高才能读出气势。例如：春风在唱歌；泉水在唱歌；小: Parallel sentences must be spoken faster and faster, and the voice must be louder and louder to read the momentum. For example: the spring breeze is singing; the spring water is singing; the birds are singing; the children are also singing.
人物开头法：林叔叔是一个见义勇为的人，遇到不平的事情总会挺身而出。今天，他又做了: How to start the character: Uncle Lin is a courageous person who will always stand up when encountering injustice. Today, he did another admirable thing.
首尾呼应结尾：林叔叔真是一个见义勇为的英雄，我们都很佩服他。: The beginning and end echo the ending: Uncle Lin is really a hero who acts bravely for justice, and we all admire him.
经过这件事小月深深地体会到世上没有免费的午餐要想有收获就要通过自己的努力去换取而: After this incident, Xiaoyue deeply realized that there is no free lunch in the world. If you want to gain something, you must earn it through your own efforts and should not break the law.
外貌描写：迎面走来一名男子，留着一头短发，戴着一副墨镜，打扮得很时尚。: Appearance description: A man walked forward, with short hair, wearing a pair of sunglasses, and dressed very fashionably.
犯罪过程描写：他假装慢慢地从林叔叔身边走过，当他与后边那位女士擦肩而过时，突然伸: Description of the crime process: He pretended to walk slowly by Uncle Lin. When he passed by the lady behind him, he suddenly reached out his hand, quickly snatched the bag from the lady's shoulder, and then ran away.
发现抢匪／小偷后的反应：女士吓得花容失色，惊慌失措地大声尖叫道：“抢劫了！快抓抢: Reaction after discovering the robber/thief: The lady turned pale with fear and screamed in panic: "It's been robbed! Catch the robber quickly!"
小偷逃跑反应：眼看小偷要逃之夭夭，小月连忙指着小偷大声喊了起来：“他是小偷！快抓: Thief's escape reaction: Seeing that the thief was about to escape, Xiaoyue quickly pointed at the thief and shouted: "He is a thief! Catch him quickly!"
失主反应：女士急忙检查自己的包，发现钱包不见了，便惊慌失措地叫了起来：“我的钱包: Owner's reaction: The lady hurriedly checked her bag and found that her wallet was missing. She screamed in panic: "My wallet is missing. Catch the thief quickly!"
报警描写：小乐一个箭步地冲去客厅，毫不犹豫地拿起电话报警。然后，他又三步并作两步: Description of calling the police: Xiao Le rushed to the living room and picked up the phone to call the police without hesitation. Then, he returned to the window in three steps and two steps at a time, and continued to stare at Aunt Wang's door, for fear that the thief had escaped, and in his heart he only hoped that the police would arrive early.
小偷被抓时的描写：幸好，警察风驰电掣地赶到了现场，将要逃之夭夭的小偷捉拿归案。小: Description of the thief when he was caught: Fortunately, the police rushed to the scene quickly and captured the thief who was about to escape. The thief was so frightened that he surrendered obediently.
称赞场景的描写：警察叔叔听了，竖起大拇指，称赞小乐是个机智勇敢的好孩子。小乐听了: Description of the praise scene: After hearing this, the police uncle gave a thumbs up and praised Xiao Le as a smart and brave good boy. After hearing this, Xiao Le felt sweet in her heart, which was sweeter than eating honey.
一、选择合适的开头：人物开头法。: 1. Choose a suitable beginning: the character opening method.
开头例句：林叔叔是一个见义勇为的人，遇到不平的事情总会挺身而出。今天，他又做了一: Example sentence at the beginning: Uncle Lin is a courageous person who always stands up for injustice. Today, he did another admirable thing.
二、事情发生的六要素：时间、地点、人物、起因、经过、结果。: 2. The six elements of what happens: time, place, person, cause, process, and result.
起因连接句：下班后，……: Connective sentence of cause: After get off work,...
经过一连接句：他假装慢慢地从林叔叔身边走过，……: After a series of sentences: He pretended to walk slowly past Uncle Lin,...
经过二连接句：林叔叔听见喊叫声，……: After two connected sentences: Uncle Lin heard the shouting,...
结果连接句：就在这时，……: Resultant connecting sentence: At this moment,...
三、选择合适的结尾：首尾呼应法。: 3. Choose an appropriate ending: echoing the beginning and the end.
结尾例句：林叔叔真是一个见义勇为的英雄，我们都很佩服他。: Ending example: Uncle Lin is really a hero who does what is right and brave. We all admire him.
图一：林叔叔去哪里？像往常一样，回家。: Picture 1: Where is Uncle Lin going? As usual, go home.
图二：那名男子做了什么？擦肩而过、伸出手、抢走、拔腿就跑。: Figure 2: What did the man do? Pass by, reach out, snatch, and run away.
图三：林叔叔听见喊叫声后有什么反应？一个箭步，冲上去。: Picture 3: How did Uncle Lin react when he heard the shouting? With one lunge, he rushed forward.
图四：警察赶到现场之后会做什么？捉拿归案。: Figure 4: What will the police do after they arrive at the scene? Caught and brought to justice.
考查情况：A 流利，有感情；B 流利，感情一般；C 不太流利。: Test status: A is fluent and emotional; B is fluent and emotional; C is not very fluent.
阅读是生命的源泉: Reading is the source of life
林叔叔是一个见义勇为的人遇到不平的事情总会挺身而出今天他又做了一件令人佩服的事儿: Uncle Lin is a brave man who always stands up for injustice. Today he did another admirable thing.
下班后，林叔叔像往常一样，慢慢地走路回家。当他快走到家的时候，看见迎面走来一名男: After get off work, Uncle Lin walked home slowly as usual. When he was almost walking home, he saw a man walking towards him, with short hair, wearing a pair of sunglasses, and dressed fashionably. He pretended to walk slowly by Uncle Lin. When he passed by the lady behind him, he suddenly reached out his hand, quickly snatched the bag from the lady's shoulder, and then ran away. The lady turned pale with fright, and screamed in panic: "It's been robbed! Catch the robber quickly!"
林叔叔听见喊叫声，急忙转过身，发现抢匪就是刚才看见的那名男子。他一个箭步地冲了上: Uncle Lin heard the shouting and turned around quickly and found that the robber was the man he saw just now. He rushed forward, chasing the robber, and shouted loudly: "Robber, where are you running? Stop right now!" Enthusiastic passers-by saw it and quickly called the police for help. Finally, Uncle Lin spent a lot of effort to catch up with the robber and catch him. When the lady saw that the robber was caught, she breathed a sigh of relief.
就在这时，警察风驰电掣地赶到了现场，将抢匪捉拿归案。然后，林叔叔把挎包还给了女士: At this moment, the police rushed to the scene and arrested the robber. Then, Uncle Lin returned the satchel to the lady. Seeing the recovered satchel, the lady was extremely excited. She gave a thumbs up, praised Uncle Lin for his bravery, and thanked Uncle Lin for his help. After hearing this, Uncle Lin said sheepishly: "It's nothing, this is what I should do."
林叔叔真是一个见义勇为的英雄我们都很佩服他: Uncle Lin is really a hero who acts bravely for justice. We all admire him.
每天读一遍抓抢匪先读慢再读顺再读出感情: Read "To Catch a Robber" once a day. First read it slowly, then read it smoothly, and then read out the feelings.
先背15个好词再背8个参考词汇最后背5个默写佳句: First memorize 15 good words, then memorize 8 reference vocabulary words, and finally memorize 5 good dictation sentences.
练习顺序：好词 → 解释 → 造句 → 佳句 → 看图讲故事 → 完整作文。: The order of practice: good words → explanation → sentence making → good sentences → telling stories through pictures → complete composition.
家长提问六要素：什么时候？在哪里？谁？发生什么事？经过怎样？结果怎样？: Six elements for parents to ask: When? Where? who? what happen? How did it go? What was the result?
让孩子用自己的话复述不必一开始逐字背: Let the children retell it in their own words without having to memorize it verbatim at first.
重点记忆连接词：下班后、当……时、突然、然后、最后、就在这时。: Focus on memorizing connectives: after get off work, when..., suddenly, then, finally, at this time.
重点记忆动作词：走过、擦肩而过、伸出手、抢走、拔腿就跑、追上、抓住、报警、捉拿归: Key action words to memorize: walk by, pass by, reach out, snatch away, run away, catch up, seize, call the police, arrest and bring to justice.
重点记忆神态词：花容失色、惊慌失措、魂飞魄散、激动万分、不好意思。: Key words for memorizing facial expressions: pale, panicked, distraught, extremely excited, and embarrassed.
每天随机抽3个成语造句，例如：见义勇为、形迹可疑、失而复得。: Randomly select 3 idioms to make sentences every day, such as: act bravely, behave suspiciously, lose and find again.
考试前练习1分钟口头复述：开头一句、经过三句、结尾一句。: Practice oral retelling for 1 minute before the exam: the first sentence, the last three sentences, and the last sentence.
成为孩子的榜样: Be a role model for your children
告诉孩子有关的新闻提醒注意: Tell your children about relevant news reminders
发现朋友做不对的行为时会及时提醒: You will be reminded in time when you discover that your friends are doing something wrong.
报纸或广告等教育和灌输国民: Educate and indoctrinate citizens through newspapers or advertisements, etc.
校长可以在周会上表扬: The principal can praise at the weekly meeting
老师可以在课堂上播放短片: Teachers can play short videos in class
老师可以与同学进行活动: Teachers can engage in activities with classmates
老师应当成为学生的好榜样: Teachers should be good role models for students
弄脏东西后清理: Clean up after making something dirty
这段录像的主要内容是：在图书馆里要为他人着想，注意自己的言行举止。: The main content of this video is: Be considerate of others and pay attention to your words and deeds in the library.
记得在我上小三的时候，有一次放学回家后，发现妈妈满脸通红、有气无力地躺在床上，原: I remember when I was in primary school, I came home from school and found my mother lying on the bed with a flushed face and weak. It turned out that my mother had a cold and a fever. Seeing how uncomfortable she was, I was so anxious that I quickly got her some cold medicine. Then I found another antipyretic patch and put it on my mother’s forehead to help her cool down. Then I ran to the coffee shop downstairs, helped my mother pack a bowl of porridge, and brought it back to feed her. After my mother finished the porridge, a happy smile appeared on her red face and she praised me as a filial child.
记得去年学校假期期间，爸爸妈妈一大早便去上班了。我和弟弟起床后，发现弟弟身体发烫: I remember that during the school holidays last year, my parents went to work early in the morning. After my brother and I got up, we found that my brother was feeling hot, so I quickly took out a thermometer to measure his temperature. After taking his temperature, I found that my brother's fever reached 39 degrees. I was shocked and quickly called my mother to tell him. When my mother found out, she immediately rushed home from the company. While I was waiting for my mother, I took a towel and wiped the sweat off my brother's body to prevent him from catching cold again. Later, my brother's illness improved. My mother praised me for growing up and knowing how to take care of my younger brother.
不小心打翻了一杯饮料把从图书馆借来的书给弄湿弄脏了尝试弄干净留下了痕迹到图书馆一: I accidentally spilled a drink and got the books I borrowed from the library wet and dirty. I tried to clean them up and left traces. I went to the library and told the administrator in detail. I apologized and was responsible for compensation. The administrator praised me for being an honest and responsible good boy.
水瓶里的水洒在食堂的地上立刻抹干净以免别人踩到滑倒受伤后果不堪设想: If the water in the water bottle is spilled on the canteen floor, wipe it up immediately to prevent others from stepping on it and causing slips and injuries.
下雨时上巴士把湿的雨伞装进塑料袋: When it rains, get on the bus and put your wet umbrella in a plastic bag
在小贩中心用餐后把碗碟放在碗盘收集处: Place dishes at the dish collection area after eating at the hawker center
父母生病时帮忙照顾弟弟妹妹做家务不让父母操心: When parents are sick, help take care of younger siblings and do housework so that parents don’t have to worry about them.
在超级市场买东西货架上的东西掉在地上帮忙捡起来放回原位避免其他人被地上的物品绊倒: When shopping at the supermarket, if something falls on the shelf, help pick it up and put it back in its place to prevent others from tripping over the items on the floor.
请家长配合鼓励互相通知: Parents please cooperate and encourage each other to inform each other
母亲节送上卡片和祝福: Send cards and wishes on Mother’s Day
打招呼很快熟悉: Say hello and get familiar quickly
举办聚会邀请参加: Host a party and invite to attend
守望相助增进感情: Watching and helping each other enhances feelings
和朋友约好不迟到: Make an appointment with your friends so that you won’t be late
不挑食不浪费: Don’t be picky about food, don’t waste food
林叔叔去哪里像往常一样回家: Where did Uncle Lin go and go home as usual?
林叔叔在路上看到了谁迎面走来一名男子: Uncle Lin saw a man walking towards him on the road.
那名男子长什么样短发墨镜打扮得很时尚: What does that man look like? He has short hair, sunglasses and is very fashionable.
那名男子做了什么擦肩而过: What did the man do to pass by?
女士被抢后有什么反应花容失色惊慌失措: What was the lady's reaction after being robbed? Her face turned pale and panicked.
语言：抢劫了，快抓抢匪啊！: Language: There has been a robbery. Catch the robber quickly!
林叔叔听见喊叫声后有什么反应一个箭步冲上去: What was Uncle Lin's reaction when he heard the shouting? He rushed forward with a lunge.
林叔叔有没有抓住抢匪费了九牛二虎之力追上抓住: Did Uncle Lin catch the robber? It took a lot of effort to catch up and catch him.
女士看到抢匪被抓后有什么反应松了一口气: The lady was relieved to see how the robber reacted after being caught
警察赶到现场之后会做什么捉拿归案: What will the police do after they arrive at the scene to arrest and bring him to justice?
B流利感情一般: B Fluent and average in emotion
好词→解释→造句→佳句→看图讲故事→完整作文: Good words → explanation → sentence creation → good sentences → tell stories through pictures → complete composition
看了这段录像我感到十分开心我认为男孩看完书后把书本放回书架上的行为是正确的是值得: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the boy's behavior of putting the books back on the bookshelf after reading them is correct and worthy of our study and praise. Because the library is a good place for everyone to read and study. Here, you must always remember to think of others, pay attention to your words and deeds, and be a good citizen who thinks of others. If it were me, I would do what they did.
在录像中我看到一个周末的上午在组屋楼下一位男孩在爸爸的帮助下学骑脚踏车突然男孩失: In the video, I saw a boy learning to ride a bicycle downstairs in a HDB flat on a weekend morning with the help of his father. Suddenly the boy lost his balance and fell to the ground. The father hurriedly stepped forward to help the boy up. The boy's father refused to let him continue learning, but the boy refused to give up. He wanted to try again. The father had no choice but to agree. This time the boy rode steadily and did not fall again.
在录像中我看到一个穿着校服的女生背着书包走在放学回家的路上突然女生发现地上有一块: In the video, I saw a girl in school uniform carrying a schoolbag and walking home from school. Suddenly the girl found a watch on the ground. The girl quickly stepped forward and picked up the watch. After a closer look, it turned out to be a watch that she liked very much. At this time, a mother, her daughter and her son were looking for something everywhere. The girl seemed very anxious. The girl guessed that this watch should be what they were looking for, so the girl walked forward in three steps and returned the watch to its original owner.
看了这段录像我感到十分开心我认为录像中女生诚实的行为是值得我们学习和称赞的因为诚: I feel very happy after watching this video. I think the honest behavior of the girl in the video is worthy of our study and praise, because honesty is a virtue. We should have the spirit of picking up money and be an honest person. When we see valuable items, we should return them to their original owners and should not keep them as our own. If I were the girl in the video, I would also return the items to their original owners in a timely manner like her.
在图片中我看到有一家人在海边开心地玩沙滩排球其中一个小男孩在打球时一个不小心用力: In the picture, I saw a family happily playing beach volleyball at the beach. One of the little boys accidentally hit a little girl with too much force while playing. The little girl screamed in pain and screamed in pain. The little boy felt very embarrassed. He bravely walked up to the little girl and apologized to the little girl. The little girl also very generously forgave him and returned the ball to the little boy.
买完食物后她端着餐盘回到座位边吃边看手机这时她的手机响了她赶快拿起手机走到快餐店: After buying the food, she returned to her seat with the dinner plate and was eating while looking at her phone. Then her phone rang. She quickly picked up the phone and walked outside the fast food restaurant to answer the phone but left her wallet on the table. The waiter at the fast food restaurant saw the wallet on the table and shook his head. He felt that the owner of the wallet was really too careless. So the waiter stood by the table waiting for the owner of the wallet to come back and reminded her to keep her valuables safe.
记得在我上小三的时候有一次放学回家后发现妈妈满脸通红有气无力地躺在床上原来妈妈感: I remember when I was in primary school, I came home from school one time and found my mother lying on the bed with a red face and weak energy. It turned out that my mother had a cold and a fever. Seeing how uncomfortable she was, I was so anxious that I quickly brought her cold medicine for her to take. Then I found an anti-pyretic patch and put it on my mother’s forehead to help her cool down. Then I ran to the coffee shop downstairs to help my mother pack a bowl of porridge and brought it back to feed my mother. After the porridge, my mother’s red face showed a happy smile and praised me as a filial child.
记得去年学校假期期间爸爸妈妈一大早便去上班了我和弟弟起床后发现弟弟身体发烫便连忙: I remember that during the school holidays last year, my parents went to work early in the morning. When my brother and I got up, we found that his body was very hot, so we quickly took out a thermometer to help him take his temperature. After taking his temperature, I found that my brother had a fever of 39 degrees. I was shocked and called my mother immediately to tell my mother. When my mother found out, she rushed home from the company. While I was waiting for my mother, I took a towel to dry the sweat on my brother to prevent him from catching another cold. Later, my brother's illness got better. My mother praised me for knowing how to take care of my brother when I grew up.
